---
title: "Introduction to the rqualify Package"
description: >
  Introduction to the rqualify Package.
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to the rqualify Package}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Please see <https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/rqualify/index.html> for the full documentation. Here is only a minimal example:

```{r, eval = FALSE}
library(rqualify)
rqualify(path_save     = tempdir(),
         setup_tinytex = TRUE,
         setup_pandoc  = TRUE,
         verbose       = TRUE)

```
